headline: Medtronic elevates Sean Haag to president of ENT
summary: Haag, who has worked at Medtronic for 20 years, will also serve on the leadership team for the neuroscience group.

headline: Medtronic Buy Case Weighed As Scientia Vascular Deal Expands Stroke Reach
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) has entered a definitive agreement to acquire Scientia Vascular, a maker of neurovascular access devices used in complex brain procedures. The deal is intended to expand Medtronic’s neurovascular product portfolio across stroke and aneurysm treatment workflows. Closing is planned for the first half of Medtronic’s fiscal year 2027, subject to regulatory approvals. For you as an investor, this move highlights how Medtronic is leaning further into neurovascular care, an...

headline: Is Medtronic (MDT) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Medtronic shares are offering good value right now, this article walks through how its current price lines up with different valuation checks. The stock last closed at US$89.89, with returns of a 7.1% decline over 7 days, a 12.6% decline over 30 days, a 6.4% decline year to date, a 0.6% decline over 1 year, a 27.3% gain over 3 years and a 12.2% decline over 5 years. This raises questions about how the current price matches the underlying business. Investors have...
